economy_principle: The player may receive large visible loot amounts, but progression, survival, domain maintenance, and strategic influence continuously drain resources.

resource_classes.description: Common high-volume currency used for potions, repairs, travel, basic crafting, and maintenance.
Resource spent to adjust conquered home-domain parameters.
Resource used to suppress dangerous mutation, reinforce anchors, and maintain domain coherence.
Resource used to bias mutation, reveal hidden marks, or interact with replay-floor memory.
Lower-frequency materials used for gear upgrades, relic crafting, and high-value dashboard actions.
